sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55102" key="katashmantiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατασημ-αντικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n55102.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">marking distinctly</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
